title: gumira pyramidata
intro: Gumira pyramidata is a plant species also known as Indian calotropis, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Gumira pyramidata include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Gumira pyramidata is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
